seoDescription: Compare climate risk scores between Gladstone Harbour and Glan Devon. See which suburb is safer from flood, bushfire, heat, and storm hazards.
ogTitle: Gladstone Harbour vs Glan Devon: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Gladstone Harbour and Glan Devon.
heading: Gladstone Harbour vs Glan Devon — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Gladstone Harbour, Queensland and Glan Devon, Queensland. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Glan Devon has a lower overall climate risk score (28/100) compared to Gladstone Harbour (29/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Gladstone Harbour or Glan Devon safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Gladstone Harbour has a flood risk score of 28/100, while Glan Devon scores 29/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Gladstone Harbour scores 17/100 for bushfire risk. Glan Devon scores 18/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Gladstone Harbour or Glan Devon?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Glan Devon has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area face minimal climate value impact based on current projections.
